stationFilter: every identity.json with schemaSetRefs across agents/, operators/, collectives/, orchestrators/, and harnesses/hulk/agents/claude/

findings.message: 11 agents bind core-triad-set-v0.6.0: claude, codex, carrie, cadence, tau, patch, claw, clia-wrkstrm, cloud, catch, chatgpt. Each verified by direct grep on 2026-05-14.

findings.stationRef: agents/* identity.json + organism.json with v1.0.0 binding (full)
findings.message: 9 organisms have FULL v1.0.0 binding (both identity.json AND organism.json): jakor, johnwhitecastle, khegh, tkoh, uptobat, wrkstrm, wrkstrm-components, prime, tempo. Landed across 2026-05-12 to 2026-05-14 commits 23e6e3f, 9af5b025, wrkstrm-components, 2c702bc1, a44c0ee0.

findings.stationRef: agents/* identity.json with v1.0.0 binding (partial — no organism.json)
findings.message: 4 organisms have PARTIAL v1.0.0 binding (identity.json only, no organism.json on disk): alphonse, helm, spark, symphony. These predate the 2026-05-12 work and appear to come from a parallel commissioning workstream. Closing the partial-to-full gap means writing each one's organism.json.

findings.stationRef: agents/* identity.json with v0.7/v0.8 binding (cadence bead corridor)
findings.message: Zero agents found in core-entity-set-v0.7.0 or v0.8.0. The cadence bead `identity-schema-set-refs-sweep` (created 2026-05-01, status: blocked) targets the v0.7/v0.8 to v0.9 migration corridor. The corridor is empty — there's no population for that bead to migrate. The bead's premise is stale either because: (a) its intended population already moved through, (b) the bead was speculatively created before agents landed in v0.7/v0.8, or (c) the population skipped v0.7/v0.8 entirely (jumped from v0.6 triad-line to v1.0 entity-line directly).

evidence.recommendation: Surface this finding to whoever owns cadence's bead. Either retarget to v0.6.0 -> v1.0.0, close as no-population-to-migrate, or run investigation pass.

findings.message: 24 organisms declare schemaSetRefs total: 13 on v1.0.0 (9 full + 4 partial) + 11 on core-triad-v0.6.0. Substrate organisms with no schemaSetRefs field at all are out of scope for this audit.

Operator-readable audit doc landed at schema-universal/universal-schema.incident.docc/v1-0-0-binding-state-audit-2026-05-14.md and linked from the incident docc index Read-next list. Commit fa30e0a (initial) + 3da9ee64 (correction with full per-agent verification) in schema-universal submodule.

extensions.imprintNotAuthorizedNote: Claude cannot touch cadence's bead without operator authorization. This receipt documents the finding for cadence's owner to decide what to do with their bead; the receipt itself does not modify cadence's substrate state.
